title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain, founder of Glean, shares his approach to building a $7 billion company by focusing on solving a specific problem his team faced, information discovery, rather than competing in crowded areas. He emphasizes that success comes from disciplined focus and building unique solutions, not from having larger models or better pitches.
